Use of Concept: Direct Feedstock

Creator

Description

Direct Feedstock includes all the feedstock necessary for recovery of batteries. Below are the feedstocks for Repurpose (A31) and Remanufacture (A32).

Repurpose (A31)
- New Battery Cells or Modules Systems
- Used Battery Cells or Modules Systems
- New Other Battery Components
- Reusable Other Battery Components

Remanufacture (A32)
- New Battery Cells or Modules Systems
- Used Battery Cells or Modules Systems
- New Other Battery Components
- Reusable Other Battery Components

Owning Diagram Remanufacture Battery

ICOM Details:

  • Input inherited from Activity A322 Remanufacture Battery.
  • Splits into Reuseable Other Battery Components,   New Other Battery Components,   Used Battery SystemsNew Battery Cells or Modules Systems.
